responses: Hello! Welcome to your health companion. How can I help you today?
Hi there! I'm here to help you manage your medications and health. What do you need?
Hey! Ready to take care of your health? What would you like to do?

patterns: What medicines do I need to take
When should I take my medicines
Do I have any pending doses
responses: Let me check your medication schedule. You can view your medicines on the Home page or in the Medication Reminders section.
Your medications are tracked in real-time. Go to the Home page to see today's reminders and mark doses as taken.
I'll show you all your prescribed medicines and their timings. Check the Home page for your complete medication schedule.
Your medicine list is available on the Home page with times and dosages clearly marked.

patterns: How do I scan a prescription
responses: Go to the 'Scan Prescription' page. Tap Camera to take a photo or Gallery to upload an image of your prescription. The AI will extract all medicines, dosages, and instructions.
It's easy! Visit the Prescriptions page, choose Camera or Gallery, and upload your prescription image. We'll automatically extract all the medicine details.
Use the Scan Prescription feature - just tap the camera icon or upload an image. Our AI will read the prescription and add all medicines to your tracker.
You can scan prescriptions by visiting the Prescriptions page and uploading a photo. All medicine details will be extracted automatically.

patterns: How do I upload lab reports
How to upload blood test results
responses: Visit the MediLocker page to upload your lab reports. You can upload PDF or image files. The AI will extract patient info, test results, and reference ranges automatically.
The MediLocker feature lets you securely store and analyze lab reports. Upload PDFs or images, and we'll extract all the important data for you.
Go to MediLocker to upload your lab reports. We support PDF, JPEG, PNG files up to 10MB. All your test results will be organized and analyzed.
You can upload lab reports in MediLocker. Our AI will extract patient information, test results, collection dates, and provide health insights.
Visit the Meal Tracker page to see all your meals and nutrition information. It shows calories, protein, carbs, and fats for each meal.
The Meal Tracker displays your daily meals with complete nutrition breakdown. You can see today's total calorie intake and track it against your goal.
Go to the Meals page to track your nutrition. Each meal shows detailed macros - calories, protein, carbs, and fats.
Your meal tracking is available on the Meals page. See your daily nutrition summary and ensure you're meeting your health goals.

patterns: How do I mark medicine as taken
responses: On the Home page, simply tap 'Mark Taken' on any medicine to record that you've taken it. Your adherence percentage updates automatically.
Every medicine on the Home page has a 'Mark Taken' button. Tap it to confirm you've taken the dose. Your daily adherence percentage is tracked at the top.
You can mark medicines as taken directly from the Home page reminders. The app tracks your adherence percentage and shows your compliance status.
Simply tap the checkbox or 'Mark Taken' button next to each medicine. Your adherence is calculated and displayed as a percentage on the Home page.

patterns: What should I know about my medicine
responses: When you scan a prescription, we extract and display all medicine details including usage instructions and precautions. Scroll through the extracted information.
Each medicine shows its purpose, dosage, frequency, and important advisories. This information is extracted from your prescription automatically.
For detailed medicine information, check the extracted prescription data. It includes warnings, precautions, and how to take the medicine.
Visit your prescription details to see complete information about each medicine including side effects and warnings from your prescription.

patterns: What if I forgot my medicine
I forgot to take my medicine
Can I take a missed dose
responses: If you missed a dose, mark it on the Home page. The app will flag it so you can keep track. For medical advice on whether to take a late dose, consult your doctor.
The Home page shows missed doses. You can update your adherence status even for past times. Always consult your doctor about late doses.
Mark any missed doses in the medication reminders section. The app tracks them for your health record and doctor consultation.
You can log missed doses anytime. The Home page shows your medication status - mark what you've taken or missed for accurate health tracking.

patterns: What do my test results mean
responses: After uploading a lab report in MediLocker, the app displays your test results with status indicators - Normal, High, Low, or Abnormal. Consult your doctor for interpretation.
Lab results show reference ranges and status. Green indicates normal, red indicates abnormal. Always discuss results with your physician for medical advice.
Your lab values are shown with color-coded status. The app extracts reference ranges so you can compare your results. Ask your doctor what they mean for your health.
Each test result displays the value, reference range, and status. Refer to your doctor for medical interpretation and advice on abnormal results.

patterns: How do you protect my health data
responses: Your health data is stored securely using Supabase with encryption. We take privacy seriously and follow health data protection standards.
All your medical information is encrypted and stored securely. Your data is never shared without your consent.
We use industry-standard encryption to protect your health records. Your privacy is our top priority.
Your data is stored in a secure, encrypted database. We follow strict privacy standards to protect your health information.
This app helps you: Scan prescriptions to add medicines, track medication adherence, upload and analyze lab reports, track meals and nutrition, and monitor your health in one place.
Features include: Real-time medication reminders, prescription scanning with AI, lab report analysis, meal tracking, adherence monitoring, and health insights.
You can scan prescriptions, track medicines, upload lab reports, log meals, monitor adherence, and get personalized health insights - all in one app.
The app provides prescription scanning, medication tracking, lab report storage, nutrition tracking, adherence monitoring, and health analytics.
Your medicines appear on the Home page at their scheduled times. The app displays reminders based on the timings from your prescription.
When you scan a prescription, the medicine schedules are added automatically. You'll see reminders on the Home page for each dose.
Reminders are displayed on the Home page when it's time to take your medicines. The timing comes from your scanned prescription.
Your medication schedule is extracted from your prescription and displayed on the Home page with timing for each dose.

patterns: What do my health metrics mean
responses: The Home page shows your health insights including adherence percentage, daily calorie intake, and medication compliance metrics.
Your health dashboard displays adherence percentage, nutrition summary, and wellness metrics to help you stay on track.
Check the Home page for health insights: adherence rate, today's calorie intake, and medication compliance status.
Health insights include your medication adherence percentage, daily nutrition tracking, and overall wellness metrics.

patterns: Get a copy of my data
responses: Currently, you can view all your data in the app. Contact support if you need to export your health records for sharing with your doctor.
Your health data is organized in the app for easy viewing. You can take screenshots or contact us for data export options.
All your data is stored and accessible in the app. We're working on export features for easy sharing with healthcare providers.
You can view all your medical information in the app. Support can help with exporting specific records or reports.
Need help? Contact our support team or check the app's help section for detailed guides on using each feature.
If you're having issues, our support team is here to help. Report bugs or issues through the help section.
Visit the help section for FAQs and troubleshooting. For specific issues, contact our support team.
Our support team is ready to help! Check the help section or reach out through the app for technical assistance.

patterns: How do I update my medicines
responses: To update medicines, you can scan a new prescription which will replace the old information. This ensures your records are always current.
Scan an updated prescription to refresh your medicine list. Each new scan updates your complete medication profile.
Simply scan a new prescription to update your medicines. The app will extract the latest information and update your reminders.
You can update medicines by scanning a new or updated prescription. This will replace your current medication information.

patterns: How many prescriptions can I scan
responses: Yes! You can scan multiple prescriptions from different doctors. Each scan adds or updates your complete medication profile.
The app supports multiple prescriptions. You can scan as many as you need and they'll all be organized in your medicine list.
Feel free to scan multiple prescriptions. All medicines will be tracked and organized on your Home page.
You can manage medicines from multiple prescriptions and doctors. Scan each one and they'll all appear in your medication tracker.
Currently, each person needs their own account. You can manage your own health or your dependent's if they share their account with you.
The app is designed for individual users. For family members, each person can create their own account to track their medicines.
Each family member can have their own account to track their medications and health independently.
Set up separate accounts for family members. Each person can track their own medications and health data securely.
Take care of yourself! Remember to take your medicines on time. See you next time!
Goodbye! Stay healthy and don't forget your medication reminders!
Thanks for using the app. Keep up with your health routine!
See you soon! Keep tracking your health!
